title: Ultimate Create Pack
body:
![Create Logo](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/create_mod/images/e/e6/Site-logo.png/revision/latest?cb=20230418165946)

**Ultimate Optimized, Edited and Visualized modpack for Create Mod!**

**Official create mod - [CLICK HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**

![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45dd581a33359da62f1b3d05264f1e46a1e8909d.png)

**This mod contains create mod and its add-ons, and also we included optimization, transportation, and farming mods! For improving create exerience we added gui and other create themed resource-packs!**

![optimization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7969ef5f5091f0469011a6c8fad4b1eab96e717c.png)

**For optimization we included Sodium, lithium, ImmediatelyFast, and other optimization mods!**

**Aslo game is optimized with vanilla settings, we used 12 render distance and fancy style!**
**If you want you can customize every single option.**

![mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f49a40b188d656a5487b2f7d5687ead01bfee97.png)

**We included a lots of mods, there is some popular ones below:**
- Sodium (https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- Create Fabric (https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- ImmersiveAircraft (https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
- Automobility (https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility)
- Farmer's Delight (https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- Xaero's World Map (https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- Traveler's Backpack (https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack
- Roughly Enough Items (https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) and more...

![support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad88ce4b5437cca8457506f7e20d37572b75a7c.png)

**If your game crashes, or you want to recommend some mods, support us on Telegram or through Modrinth!**


_Modpack made by QuartzGG_
